title: Korbond 30 Piece Needle Compact by Korbond – Needle Assortment for a Multitude of Hand Sewing, Betweens Tapestry & Darning Needles, White|blue|grey
features: 30 piece set of hand sewing needles, suitable for general purpose sewing, tailoring, Quilting, tapestry, yarn work, canvas, darning, mending and repairs
Set includes; 16 x sharps, 8 x between, 1 x tapestry, 5 x darning
Needle length: between 3cm, sharps 3. 8cm & 4cm, Darners 4. 9cm & 5. 1cm, tapestry 4. 8cm
Manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of sewing applications
With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Needle Compact. 30 Pieces Korbond Needle Compact offers a variety of popular needles in different sizes including betweens, sharps, tapestry and darning needles which cater for sewing, mending, quality tailoring and canvas work. Contents Include: 30 assorted needles in an easy to store plastic needle dispenser Tapestry- An extra-long eye for thick yarns, with a blunt point for use on canvases Betweens- Small needles preferred by professional sewers Sharps- For general domestic sewing Darners- Long needles with long eyes for easy threading. Handy Usages For Korbond Care & Repair Needle Compact. Stitching Buttons With this assorted needle compact choosing the right sized needle to replace a button, sew on a popper, or add a hook fastener, is quick and easy for even the most novice sewer. Hand Sewing Multipurpose needle pack for sewing and crafting projects. A variety of 30 needles in assorted lengths and sharpness. Including long eyed needles for easy threading. Suitable for basic general needlework and experienced crafters. All Craft Projects Each compact contains a selection needles differing in length, eye size and sharpness, perfect for dressmaking, quilting, applique, embroidery and all types of upcycling projects, from sewing fine fabrics to heavy-duty materials. Repairing A household staple for every sewing kit. Needles are displayed in a convenient dispenser that makes it easy to select the right needle for each task; repairing tears in clothes, darning holes, sewing thick or stiff materials, or mending upholstery.
